title: Cummins Distribution Business President Tracy Embree to Depart the Company
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) announced that Tracy Embree, Cummins Vice President and President of the Distribution Business, is leaving Cummins on September 8 to pursue an external opportunity. Tracy served in a variety of leadership roles during her distinguished 23-year career at Cummins. “Tracy has had a tremendous impact on people and our business during her career at Cummins,” said Jennifer Rumsey, Cummins Inc. Chair and CEO. “She is a role model for our.

title: Cummins (CMI) Powers First Hydrogen Passenger Train in NA
text: Cummins (CMI) is powering the Coradia iLint, North America's first hydrogen passenger train.

title: Federman & Sherwood Investigates Cummins Behavioral Health Systems, Inc. for Data Breach
text: OKLAHOMA CITY--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Avon--The law firm of Federman & Sherwood has initiated an investigation into Cummins Behavioral Health Systems, Inc. (“Cummins”) with respect to their recent data breach. On August 11, 2023, Cummins notified individuals that the company experienced a data breach after an unauthorized party accessed sensitive consumer data entrusted to the company. The breach was discovered on March 9, 2023. According to Cummins, they determined that information stored on their ser.

title: Accelera Powers North America's First Green Hydrogen Passenger Train
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #cummins--Accelera™ by Cummins, the zero-emission business segment of Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI), is powering North America's first hydrogen passenger train, marking a major milestone and significant step forward in the transition to clean urban transportation in the Americas. The train, the Coradia iLint, is manufactured by Alstom, the global green and smart mobility leader. The Coradia iLint train entered service in Canada on June 17 as part of Alstom's demonstration proj.

title: Cummins and Chevron Advance Strategic Collaboration
text: COLUMBUS, Ind. & SAN RAMON, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cummins and Chevron announce their expanded MOU, collaborating in hydrogen, natural gas and renewable transportation fuels.

title: Cummins (CMI) Q2 Earnings Disappoint on Narrowing Margins
text: Cummins (CMI) misses second-quarter earnings on narrowing EBITDA margins in all segments except the Power System segment.

title: Cummins (CMI) Q2 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Cummins (CMI) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Cummins (CMI) Q2 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Cummins (CMI) came out with quarterly earnings of $5.18 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $5.19 per share. This compares to earnings of $4.77 per share a year ago.

title: Cummins misses profit expectations on high manufacturing costs
text: Engine maker Cummins reported a second-quarter profit on Thursday that missed analysts' estimates, hurt by high manufacturing costs.

title: Cummins Reports Strong Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) today reported results for the second quarter of 2023. Second quarter revenues of $8.6 billion increased 31 percent from the same quarter in 2022. Sales in North America increased 31 percent and international revenues increased 32 percent due to the addition of Meritor and strong demand across most global markets. “Strong demand across most of our key markets and regions resulted in record revenues and solid profitability for the company.
